executives.name: Jamie Haenggi
executives.background: Jamie Haenggi has served as a director since 2020. She is the President of ADT Solar and has held various executive roles at ADT since 2016.

executives.name: Kathryn Mikells
executives.background: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2021. Previously served as CFO of Diageo plc and held executive roles at United Airlines and ADT.

executives.name: Naren Gursahaney
executives.background: Former president and CEO of ADT Corporation. Director since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Naren Gursahaney
board_of_directors.background: Former president and CEO of ADT Corporation. Director since 2014.
